{{Infobox technique
| name = soulfire
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

''See also: [[soulfire Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Soulfire is a specialized form of condensed [[vital aura]] that serves as the defining characteristic and power source for [[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]]. It acts as a transitional bridge between the [[madra]] system and higher levels of power, allowing users to exert their will directly upon the world. This energy can be used to empower various techniques, enhance weapons to be tougher than [[steel]], and facilitate the creation of advanced artifacts through processes like [[Soulsmithing]]. Beyond combat applications, soulfire plays a vital role in physical and spiritual transformation. It can be used to reforge a person's body, cleansing impurities from the [[spirit]] and strengthening bones and [[madra channels]]. While it can be used to enhance physical attributes or provide weak control over [[aura]], its primary function is as a signature of [[advancement]]. The quality and color of soulfire vary by rank, with [[Archlord]]-level soulfire appearing as reflective quicksilver. While the process of being remade by soulfire is generally painless, it is a fundamental requirement for advancing through the higher realms of power.}}

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a gray-white, half-transparent flame that is perfectly round and spins slowly.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is the signature of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Jai Daishou]] uses stockpiled [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20">''Blackflame'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] can be used to make mundane materials like [[Iron{{!}}iron]] stronger and allow them to conduct [[madra]] and [[aura]] more efficiently.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c20" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Underlord]] bodies can be forged in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c1">''Skysworn'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a gray, almost colorless flame that can be ignited on fingertips.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is the power of an [[Underlord]] and a hallmark of a [[Lord]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a type of energy used to fuel seals.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c13">''Skysworn'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]] and above have their bodies reforged by [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c9">''Ghostwater'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a type of energy/power.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Eithan]] can use [[soulfire]] to empower his [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Lindon]] will need to reforge his body and [[spirit]] in [[soulfire]] after [[Truegold]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c16">''Ghostwater'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] burns away impurities, refines the physical vessel, and empowers [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c18">''Ghostwater'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">14</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a by-product of connecting to the world around you.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is considered the real mark of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]] burn treasures for [[soulfire]] to progress through [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is [[vital aura]] distilled and the power of the world condensed.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Kiro]] drew on his reserve of [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a type of energy [[Yerin]] can weave.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is absorbed by emerald [[madra]] leaves.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is present in [[Lindon]]'s [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] rebuilds a person's lifeline during [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]] forms a bridge between his [[spirit]] and the [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] rushed from the [[The Book of Eternal Night{{!}}Book of Eternal Night]] into [[Mercy]]'s [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] can be injected into the [[Titan’s Blade]] [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Prince Seishen Kiro{{!}}Kiro]] released a [[Striker technique]] from his left hand by pouring [[soulfire]] into it.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] to retreat the pressure of [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] uses [[gray soulfire]] in conjunction with [[pure madra]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7">''Uncrowned'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Grace]] pours [[soulfire]] into her [[sword]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c7" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[dragon]] resonates with its [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c8">''Uncrowned'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Underlady]] used [[soulfire]] in her [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c11">''Uncrowned'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Eithan]]'s [[pure madra]] was reinforced with [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c13">''Uncrowned'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Akura Pride{{!}}Pride]] pours [[madra]] and [[soulfire]] into a blow.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14">''Uncrowned'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a type of energy [[Lindon]] can use.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] uses [[soulfire]] to assist her [[Enforcer technique]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a type of enhancement.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c15">''Uncrowned'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] rushes through Naia's [[Forged claws]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c16">''Uncrowned'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Sword Sage]]'s [[technique]] involves concentrated [[aura]], [[madra]], and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c19">''Uncrowned'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Lindon]] pours [[soulfire]] into his right hand.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">12</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Timaias Adama{{!}}Adama]]'s body has been thrice reborn in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] can be infused into techniques to make them larger and brighter.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4">''Wintersteel'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Luminous Queen Sha Miara{{!}}Sha Miara]] uses [[soulfire]]-controlled [[aura]] to hurl a piano.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] taps into her [[soulfire]] to begin [[advancement]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c4" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Underlord{{!}}Underlords]] advance by condensing their [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c7">''Wintersteel'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Eithan]]'s [[soulfire]] resonates with surrounding [[aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] streamed into [[Lindon]]'s [[spirit]] during the power drain.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c13">''Wintersteel'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]] has already passed his [[soulfire]] revelations.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c15">''Wintersteel'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] used [[soulfire]] to push away a [[dream aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c16">''Wintersteel'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] creates a bridge between her [[soulfire]] and the artifacts around her.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c24">''Wintersteel'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Sopharanatoth{{!}}Sophara]] has control over [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c25">''Wintersteel'', chapter 25</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] empowers [[Yerin]]'s [[Flowing Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Bloodline ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is described as the staircase between the [[madra]] system and the next level up.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c5">''Bloodline'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] used [[soulfire]] to strengthen his [[Archlord]] body.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19">''Bloodline'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Yerin]] is filling her swords with [[madra]] and [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] expands [[Orthos]]'s body as it burns.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20">''Bloodline'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] merges into the [[Fox Dream]] [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a substance or energy needed to reverse [[Orthos]]'s size.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21">''Bloodline'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Eithan]] used up his [[soulfire]] to heal himself.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c21" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">15</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is required for [[Orthos]] to grow and shrink.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] reinforces her grass [[darts]] with [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5">''Reaper'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] to manipulate air.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c5" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The ways of [[soulfire]] are unknown to [[Truegold{{!}}Truegolds]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6">''Reaper'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Jai Long]] can use [[soulfire]] to burst techniques.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c6" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] fused a loop of [[dream madra]] to [[Dross]]' [[spirit]] using [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c9">''Reaper'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] uses [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14">''Reaper'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] bathes [[Lindon]]'s [[technique]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c14" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] poured [[soulfire]] into his defenses.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c17">''Reaper'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Mercy]] can control the air with her [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c18">''Reaper'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a power [[Lindon]] considers using.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Ziel of the Wasteland{{!}}Ziel]] burns through [[soulfire]] to power his abilities.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c20">''Reaper'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] used a [[soulfire]]-infused [[Empty Palm]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23">''Reaper'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] wants more [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a power running through [[Jai Long]]'s veins.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c24">''Reaper'', chapter 24</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]] uses [[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c11">''Dreadgod'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is needed to help [[Orthos]] reach [[Archlord]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">7</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Little Blue]] can handle another dose of [[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c3">''Waybound'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Mercy]] stores sparks of [[soulfire]] while [[cycling]] [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]]'s [[soulfire]] dipped low.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c11">''Waybound'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Archlord natural treasures]] turned into [[soulfire]] in [[Orthos]]'s [[spirit]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c17">''Waybound'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] is a silver rush of energy.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c19">''Waybound'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Lindon]] uses [[soulfire]] in his [[Blackflame]] blast.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]] burned [[soulfire]] to transform into his original form.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c30">''Waybound'', chapter 30</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[soulfire{{!}}Soulfire]] gave birth to [[Reigan Shen{{!}}Reigan]]'s [[Lord]] body.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Reigan Shen]] ignites his [[soulfire]] to begin a transformation.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Riyusai Meira{{!}}Meira]] spins [[soulfire]] during her training.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
